html:
Exclusive to:

“Explore unknown areas of the map with the Roto-Mapper.

WX-78 gave this drone the name of Scott.”

-

Roto-Mapper is an item which can only crafted by WX-78 with the Field Survey skill and can only be used by them. It is a robot capable of exploring the map and revealing area for the player. It works like an Ocuvigil, revealing the area on the map without loading the area itself. The area revealed by the Roto-Mapper is exclusive to its owner and cannot be seen by other players. Up to 2 Roto-Mappers each can exist in Surface and Caves Shard.

It has a limit of 50 Tiles at which the player can control it. With the Signal Booster skill, the distance is extended by 75 Tiles. With the Beta Circuits Tinkering I skill, plugging in each Rangebooster Circuit extends the distance by 25 Tiles.

To control the Roto-Mapper, open the map and right-click its icon, then player can simply left-click where they want the Roto-Mapper to go. If the Roto-Mapper is out of range, they can still call it back into the range.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Distinguished
Jeweled Collection
Rococo Reconnaissance
Too fancy for exploring, yet explore it must!
Woven - Distinguished
Gothic Collection
Macabre Mapper
It feels at home in the fog and mist of lands unknown.

Tips

  • Player can place one Backup Chassis with the Beta Circuits Tinkering I skill and 7 Rangebooster Circuits in the center of the map. This setup extends the distance of the Roto-Mappers to cover the whole map. The player can transfer to the Chassis whenever they need to control the Roto-Mappers.

Trivia

  • The Roto-Mapper is added in WX-78 Skill Spotlight update.

Assets

Roto-MapperRococo ReconnaissanceMacabre Mapper

  • Idle (Purple Light)

  • Idle (OrangeLight)

“So far, so good.”
–Wilson
“Get lost, Scott!”
–Willow
“Brave little exploring machine!”
–Wolfgang
“Are you ever afraid?”
–Wendy
“TRY NOT TO GET LOST AGAIN, SCOTT”
–WX-78
“We are indebted to this intrepid little scout.”
–Wickerbottom
“Adventurous little guy, eh?”
–Woodie
“Oh, get lost already!”
–Maxwell
“Gö förth, valiant scöutling!”
–Wigfrid
“How come it's allowed to wander off?”
–Webber
“Where will you go next?”
–Warly
“Thanks, brave friend!”
–Wormwood
“Careful out there, lil' fella.”
–Winona
“It has flown to parts unknown!”
–Wortox
“Where you going?”
–Wurt
“Scott sure likes to explore!”
–Walter
“And where are we off to next?”
–Wanda
“Explore unknown areas of the map with the Roto-Mapper.
WX-78 gave this drone the name of Scott.”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Roto-Mapper là một vật phẩm chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi WX-78 với kỹ năng Khảo sát thực địa và chỉ họ mới có thể sử dụng. Nó là một robot có khả năng khám phá bản đồ và tiết lộ khu vực cho người chơi. Nó hoạt động giống như Ocuvigil, hiển thị khu vực trên bản đồ mà không cần tải khu vực đó. Khu vực được Roto-Mapper tiết lộ là dành riêng cho chủ sở hữu của nó và những người chơi khác không thể nhìn thấy. Mỗi người có thể tồn tại tối đa 2 Roto-Mappers trong Surface Shard và Caves Shard.
